blocks.title: 📘 WILL vs GOING TO vs -ING
blocks.intro: El inglés tiene tres futuros y cada uno dice algo distinto: will (decisión ahora / promesa / predicción), going to (plan / evidencia) y present continuous (cita ya fijada).

cells.body:
Decisión del momento, promesa, predicción:
I'll get it! (ahora)
I'll send it tonight, promise.

Plan / intención, o evidencia visible:
I'm going to improve the checkout.
Look at those clouds — it's going to rain.

Cita / arreglo ya fijado (con fecha):
I'm meeting the designers on Monday.

by Friday = antes del/para el viernes
by then = para entonces
I'll have it done by the fifteenth.

I will meet the designers on Monday at 9. (cita fijada → continuous)
I'm meeting the designers on Monday at 9.

blocks.ladderLabel: ¿Qué tan planeado está? — de improvisado a agendado:
blocks.note: Cómo funciona: esta lección mezcla memory 🧠, escucha 🎧, completar 📝 y unir 🔗. Haz el ✓ CHECK en cada ejercicio. Al terminar… te espera el BOSS 👑.

blocks.title: ★ THE ROADMAP
blocks.intro: Fin de trimestre. Priya reúne al equipo para planear el que viene: fase dos, metas, fechas. Y al final de la reunión, una noticia grande: David tiene planes de expansión… y alguien va a tener que presentar the big pitch. 👑

blocks.title: MEMORY · forma y uso
blocks.intro: Encuentra cada forma de futuro con su uso. Toca dos cartas.

blocks.title: AUDIO 1 · THE PLANNING CALL
blocks.desc: Priya, Sofia y Marcos planean el próximo trimestre. Fechas, promesas y predicciones — los tres futuros en acción.

questions.q: When are they launching the mobile app?
What is Marcos going to improve first?
What is Sofia doing on Monday?
Priya thinks GreenMarket's sales will double next year.

speaking.prompt: Describe the team's roadmap in 3 sentences. Use going to, present continuous, and by + time.
speaking.starter: They're launching the app in October. Marcos is going to… and by the end of the month…

transcript.html: Okay team, last meeting of the quarter. Let's look ahead — what's the roadmap?
Phase two. We're launching the mobile app in October. It's all arranged — I'm meeting the designers on Monday to start.
First, I'm going to improve the checkout speed — that's my main goal. By the end of the month, the page will load in under two seconds.
Under two seconds? Will you really finish by then?
Don't worry — I'll have it done by the fifteenth. I promise.
Then I'm happy. And here's my forecast: with the app and a faster checkout, I think GreenMarket's sales will double next year.
Double? I'll hold you to that prediction, Priya!
Ha! Let's see. Right — great quarter, everyone. And Marcos… check your messages after this. I have news.

blocks.title: WILL, GOING TO o -ING
blocks.intro: Elige el futuro correcto según la situación.

items.q: Look at those clouds — it ___ rain.
I promise I ___ send the report tonight.
We ___ launching phase two in October.
She ___ to study English in Canada next year.
I'll have the report ready ___ Friday.
The phone's ringing! — Don't worry, I ___ get it.

blocks.title: UNE LAS EXPRESIONES DE TIEMPO
blocks.intro: Toca la expresión en inglés y luego su significado.

pairs.l: by the end of the year

blocks.title: AUDIO 2 · THE MESSAGE 👑
blocks.desc: El mensaje que Priya le dejó a Marcos después de la reunión. Una noticia grande… y un desafío más grande.

questions.q: What is David going to do?
What is Marcos doing next Friday?
options: Presenting the expansion plan to David

questions.q: Priya believes Marcos will do a great job.

speaking.prompt: You are Marcos. Answer Priya's message: accept the challenge and say TWO things you're going to prepare.
speaking.starter: Hi Priya, thanks for trusting me! I'll do it. First, I'm going to prepare… and by Thursday I'll…

transcript.html: Marcos, it's Priya. Here's the news. David called me this morning — GreenMarket is going to expand. Three new countries next year. Spain, Portugal… and Mexico. It's huge. He's visiting our office next Friday, and he wants to see the full plan. And here's the thing: I'm not going to present it. You are. You've grown so much this quarter — you run meetings, you negotiate, you push back with data. You're ready. So, next Friday, the big pitch. Prepare well, get some rest before it… and don't worry. I know you'll be brilliant. Talk soon.

blocks.title: ✍️ MY ROADMAP
blocks.intro: Escribe TU roadmap personal para los próximos 3 meses (inglés, trabajo, vida — 6–8 frases):
checklist: 1 cita ya fijada con present continuous + fecha (I'm …ing on…)
2 fechas límite con by (by August, by the end of…)
blocks.placeholder: Next quarter is going to be big for me. First, I'm going to…
blocks.example: Next (quarter / year) is going to be big for me. First, I'm going to (plan) — by (month), I'll (prediction). I'm also going to (plan) in (month). I'm (arrangement) on (day) to (purpose). I'll (promise) every single day, I promise! By the end of the year, I think (prediction).
blocks.hw: Escribe tu roadmap y grábate leyéndolo. Envíame texto y audio por WhatsApp. ¡Y prepárate: el BOSS te espera! 👑
